title: sida tragiifolia
intro: Sida tragiifolia, also known as the 'funnel flower' or 'funnel sida', is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial plant with funnel-shaped yellow flowers and medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat various health conditions.
